cause: The first target-detail ratios used an implicit 230-pixel eye distance instead of the frozen target-feature horizontal IPD of 227 pixels. Its mapping indices remain diagnostic, but its target-detail hash cannot bind the corrected metric contract.
correction: Derive every detail ratio and uncertainty from target-feature-geometry.json, preserve annotations as numeric UTF-8 data, include mapping distance in uncertainty, and rerun the one-time map against the corrected target-detail hash.
